pages.title: AFML
pages.text: .article > .title, h1.title.is-3 { display:none !important; } Group Leader: Professor Yong Li Deputy Director of Institute of Acoustics of Tongji University Deputy Director of Civil Aviation Key Laboratory of Intelligent Assisted Airworthiness for Aircraft Structures Research Interests: Physical Acoustics, Acoustic Metamaterials, Noise and Vibration Control We are always seeking outstanding postdoctoral researchers and highly motivated Ph.D. and M.S. students to join our group. Prospective candidates are encouraged to contact us for further information. 👨‍🏫 About Us Focusing on the scientific challenges of acoustic field manipulation in complex environments, Professor Li has long been engaged in the theoretical and applied research of acoustic functional materials. As the first or corresponding author (including co-authors), he has published more than 110 papers in leading international journals such as Physical Review Letters, National Science Review, Science Advances, Nature Communications, Nature Reviews Materials, Nature Reviews Physics, Reports on Progress in Physics, and Science Bulletin, among which 14 are ESI highly cited papers. His research results have been selected multiple times as Editors’ Suggestions and have been featured by media outlets such as APS, AIP, Phys.org, Physics Buzz, and Science Daily. His publications have accumulated over 13,800 citations with an H-index of 54. He has been listed several times among the Highly Cited Researchers and the world’s top 2% scientists (career-long impact). He received the First Prize of the Ministry of Education Natural Science Award and the “Wei Mo’an Acoustics Award” from the Shanghai Acoustical Society, and his students won the National Gold Medal of the China International College Students Innovation Competition. Patents related to acoustic metamaterial absorbers have been successfully transferred and applied to large-scale wind-tunnel compressor noise-reduction systems, achieving low-noise operation of major equipment. 🧠 Research Interests1. Manipulation of Exotic Fields with Acoustic Functional Materials This direction focuses on the fundamental mechanisms of acoustic field manipulation in artificial structures and functional materials, exploring wave propagation, interference, and localization in complex media. The research emphasizes resonant coupling, wavefront shaping, and nonreciprocal sound transmission to elucidate the physical nature of sound–matter interactions, providing theoretical foundations and design principles for precise acoustic energy control and advanced acoustic devices. 2. Application Explorations of Acoustic Functional Materials Aimed at the noise control and acoustic optimization needs of major equipment, this research advances the applied fundamentals of acoustic functional materials. It develops high-performance sound-absorbing metamaterials and multifunctional composites based on deep-subwavelength structural design, and systematically investigates energy management mechanisms involving resonance, coupling, interference, and dissipation. The goal is to realize broadband, efficient, lightweight, and programmable sound absorption and insulation schemes that support innovation in transportation, aerospace, and precision acoustic engineering. 3. Non-Hermitian and Topological Acoustics This research area explores the emerging intersection of non-Hermitian physics and topological acoustics, focusing on the acoustic realization and dynamics of gain/loss modulation, exceptional points (EPs), and topological edge states. It uncovers new physical phenomena such as nonreciprocal sound propagation, asymmetric mode coupling, and robust energy transport. By constructing non-Hermitian topological structures and nonreciprocal acoustic channels, the work advances robust acoustic communication, reconfigurable wave control, and intelligent acoustic systems. 📢 Highlights 2026 🪪 In April, Dr. Nengyin Wang was awarded as Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai 🎓 In March, Congratulations to Nengyin Wang on passing his PhD thesis defense 🌍 In March, Associate Professor Mourad Oudich and Dr. Anis Maddi from the University of Lorraine (France) visited the group for academic exchange 📝 In February, Hua Ding and Nengyin Wang published their research on Broadband Acoustic Metamaterial Liners under Grazing Flow in Physical Review Applied 📝 In February, Kaijing Liu and Yihuan Zhu published their research on AI-Driven Acoustic Metamaterials for Pixel-Accurate Sound Insulation Control in Chinese Physics Letters 📝 In January, Yu Xiao’s research on the evolution of scattering singularities in acoustic metasurfaces was published in Science China: Physics, Mechanics & Astronomy 📝 In January, Yujie Cheng and Hua Ding published their research on Broadband Lightweight Metal-Mesh-Integrated Acoustic Metaliner in Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 In January, Professor Yong Li was selected for the 2025 Elsevier “Highly Cited Chinese Researchers” 2025 🪪 In December, Ge Chuanhao’s master’s thesis was selected as Tongji University’s 2025 Excellent Master’s Thesis. 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang was selected for the CAST Young Scientific and Technological Talent Development Program (Doctoral Special Program) 🔬 In December, Yihuan Zhu was selected for the CAST Young Scientific and Technological Talent Development Program (Doctoral Special Program) 🔬 In December, Dr. Ruizhi Dong selected for the Shanghai Post-doctoral Excellence Program 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University Outstanding Student Model award 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Bronze Convergence Award at the 5th “HaiJu YingCai” Global Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition 🪪 In November, Yihuan Zhu received the Tongji University Outstanding Doctoral Student Scholarship 🪪 In November, Professor Yong Li was invited to join the APS Open Science journal’s Editorial Advisory Board 🪪 In November, Huang Sibo was selected as a National High-Level Young Talent Program 🔬 In November, Dr. Zhiling Zhou received the Hong Kong RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 In October, Dr. Sibo Huang appointed as Associate Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University 🪪 In October, Nengyin Wang received the National Doctoral Scholarship 🪪 In October, Quansen Wang received the National Doctoral Scholarship 🪪 In October, Chun Liu received the National Master’s Scholarship 📝 In September, Dr. Jingyi Chen and Dr. Zhiling Zhou published their research on hybrid degeneracy points in projected non-Hermitian systems in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In September, Prof. Yong Li recognized among the World’s Top 2% Scientists (Career Impact) 📝 In August, Quansen Wang and Chun Liu published their work on chirality-protected asymmetric acoustic information transport in Nature Communications 🪪 In June, Chun Liu received the ORION Master’s Scholarship from Université de Lorraine, France 📝 In June, Chuanhao Ge and Nengyin Wang published their research on the causality constraint in acoustic absorbers in Physical Review Letters 📝 In May, Nengyin Wang, Dr. Zhiling Zhou and Dr. Sibo Huang published their study on ultra-broadband metamaterial absorbers in National Science Review 📝 In May, Ruizhi Dong and Yihuan Zhu published their research on topological bound states in the continuum in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In May, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University “Pursuing Excellence” Student Nomination Award 2024 🔬 In December, Prof. Yong Li awarded the Shanghai “Oriental Talent” Leading Program 🔬 In December, Dr. Chen Shao selected for the Shanghai Post-doctoral Excellence Program 🪪 In December, Nengyin Wang recognized as one of the 18th Tongji University Academic Pioneer Graduate Students 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang received the NSFC Basic Research Doctoral Student Project 🪪 In November, Dr. Sibai Huang was selected for a National-Level Young Talent Program 🪪 In November, Quansen Wang received the ASA CIRE Student Award (Acoustical Society of America) 🔬 In November Dr. Chen Shao received the China Postdoctoral Science Foundation Grant 🪪 In October, Prof. Yong Li honored as Outstanding Innovation and Entrepreneurship Mentor at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the National Gold Medal at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the Gold Award / Runner-up Prize (Shanghai Region) at the same competition 🔬 In August, Dr. Chen Shao received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🔬 In August, Dr. Chao Song received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🪪 In May, Dr. Zhiling Zhou awarded the Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai 🪪 In March, Dr. Zhiling Zhou’s dissertation selected as a Tongji University Excellent Doctoral Dissertation 2023 📝 In October, Our review article on nonlocal and non-Hermitian acoustic metasurfaces has been published in Reports on Progress in Physics 📝 In March, Zhiling Zhou and Bin Jia’s research on chiral metasurfaces has been published in Physical Review Letters 📝 In March, Nengyin Wang and Dr. Sibo Huang’s research on metamaterial silencers has been published in International Journal of Extreme Manufacturing More news →

pages.title: 声功能材料实验室
pages.text: .article > .title, h1.title.is-3 { display:none !important; } 课题组负责人：李勇 教授 同济大学声学研究所副所长 民航航空器结构智能辅助适航重点实验室副主任 研究方向： 物理声学、声学超构材料、噪声振动控制 课题组长期招收博士后及博士、硕士研究生。 欢迎富有科研热情的青年学者加盟！有意者请联系我们！ 👨‍🏫 个人介绍 围绕复杂环境中声场调控的科学难题，长期从事声学人工结构的理论与应用研究。以第一或通讯作者（含共同）在 Physical Review Letters、National Science Review、Science Advances、Nature Communications、Nature Reviews Materials、Nature Reviews Physics、Reports on Progress in Physics、Science Bulletin 国际期刊发表论文 110 余篇（其中14篇 ESI 高被引论文）。研究成果多次入选编辑推荐文章，并被 APS、AIP、Phys.org、Physics Buzz、Science Daily 等媒体专题报道。论文累计被引用超过13,800次，H 因子54，多次入选全球高被引学者及全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力）。曾获教育部自然科学奖一等奖、上海市声学学会“魏墨盦声学奖”，指导学生获中国国际大学生创新大赛全国金奖。超构吸声体相关专利已实现成果转化，应用大型压气机降噪系统，实现低噪声运行目标。 🧠 研究方向1. 功能材料奇异声场调控 围绕人工结构与功能材料中的声场调控机制展开基础研究，探讨声波在复杂介质中的传播、干涉及局域化规律。研究聚焦于共振耦合、波前整形与非互易声传输等异常波动特性，力求阐明声场与材料相互作用的物理本质，为高精度声能操控与新型声学器件提供理论依据与设计思路。 2. 声学功能材料应用探索 面向装备的噪声控制与声学性能优化需求，开展声学功能材料的应用基础研究。重点推进基于深亚波长结构的高性能吸声超构材料与多功能复合体系设计，系统分析共振、耦合、干涉及耗散机制下的声学能量管理规律。研究目标在于实现宽频、高效、轻量化与可编程的吸隔声方案，支撑交通、航空航天与精密声学工程等领域的技术创新。 3. 非厄米声学及拓扑声学 聚焦非厄米物理与拓扑声学的交叉前沿，系统研究增益/损耗调控、奇异点（EP）及拓扑边缘态的声学实现与动力学特征。重点揭示非互易声传播、模态耦合非对称性及能量传输鲁棒性等新型物理规律。通过构建非厄米拓扑结构与非互易声波通道，推动高鲁棒声通信、可重构声场操控与智能声学系统的发展。 📢 大事件 2026年 🪪 4月 王能银博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 🎓 3月 祝贺王能银同学通过博士学位论文答辩 🌍 3月 法国洛林大学Mourad Oudich副教授和Anis Maddi博士来访交流 📝 2月 丁华和王能银关于切向流下宽带超构声衬的研究成果发表于Physical Review Applied 📝 2月 刘开静和朱一寰关于AI驱动声学超构材料精准隔声调控的研究成果发表于Chinese Physics Letters 📝 1月 肖钰关于声学超表面散射奇异点的演化的研究成果发表于Science China: Physics, Mechanics and Astronomy - 文章简介 📝 1月 程榆傑和丁华关于融合金属丝网的轻质宽带超构声衬研究成果发表于Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 1月 李勇教授入选2025爱思唯尔“中国高被引学者”榜单 2025年 🪪 12月 葛传昊的学位论文入选同济大学2025年优秀硕士学位论文 🔬 12月 王泉森入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 朱一寰入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 董睿智博士入选上海市“超级博士后” 🪪 11月 黄思博博士入选国家级青年人才项目 🪪 11月 王能银获同济大学优秀学生标兵 🪪 11月 王能银获第五届“海聚英才”全球创新创业大赛铜聚奖 🪪 11月 朱一寰获同济大学优秀博士生奖学金 🪪 11月 李勇教授加入APS Open Science期刊Editorial Advisory Board 🔬 11月 周志凌博士获中国香港政府 RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 10月 黄思博博士获聘上海交通大学副教授 🪪 10月 王能银获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 王泉森获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 刘春获硕士生国家奖学金 📝 09月 陈静怡和周志凌博士关于投影非厄米系统中混合简并点的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 09月 李勇教授入选全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力） 📝 08月 王泉森和刘春关于手性保护非对称声信息传输的研究成果发表于自然·通讯 🪪 06月 刘春获法国洛林大学ORION硕士奖学金 📝 06月 葛传昊和王能银关于吸声结构因果律的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 05月 王能银和周志凌/黄思博博士关于超宽频超构吸声体的研究成果发表于国家科学评论 📝 05月 董睿智和朱一寰关于连续谱中拓扑束缚态的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 05月 王能银获同济大学追求卓越学生提名奖 2024年 🔬 12月 李勇教授获批上海市东方英才领军项目 🔬 12月 邵晨博士入选上海市“超级博士后”资助 🪪 12月 王能银入选同济大学第十八届研究生学术先锋 🔬 12月 王泉森获批基金委基础研究专项博士生项目 🪪 11月 王泉森获美国声学学会CIRE学生奖 🔬 11月 邵晨获批中国博士后基金面上项目 🪪 10月 李勇教授获中国国际大学生创新大赛优秀创新创业导师 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛全国金奖 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛上海赛区亚军/金奖 🔬 8月 邵晨博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🔬 8月 宋潮博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🪪 5月 周志凌博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 🪪 3月 周志凌博士论文入选同济大学优秀博士学位论文 2023年 📝 10月 团队关于非局域和非厄米声学超构表面综述文章发表于物理学进展报告 📝 3月 周志凌和贾彬关于手性超构表面的科研成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 3月 王能银和黄思博博士关于超构消声器的科研成果发表于极端制造 查看更多新闻 →

pages.title: 📢 大事件
pages.text: 2026年 🪪 4月 王能银博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 🎓 3月 祝贺王能银同学通过博士学位论文答辩 🌍 3月 法国洛林大学Mourad Oudich副教授和Anis Maddi博士来访交流 📝 2月 丁华和王能银关于切向流下宽带超构声衬的研究成果发表于Physical Review Applied 📝 2月 刘开静和朱一寰关于AI驱动声学超构材料精准隔声调控的研究成果发表于Chinese Physics Letters 📝 1月 肖钰关于声学超表面散射奇异点的演化的研究成果发表于Science China: Physics, Mechanics and Astronomy - 文章简介 📝 1月 程榆傑和丁华关于融合金属丝网的轻质宽带超构声衬研究成果发表于Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 1月 李勇教授入选2025爱思唯尔“中国高被引学者”榜单 2025年 🪪 12月 葛传昊的学位论文入选同济大学2025年优秀硕士学位论文 🔬 12月 王泉森入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 朱一寰入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 董睿智博士入选上海市“超级博士后” 🪪 11月 黄思博博士入选国家级青年人才项目 🪪 11月 王能银获同济大学优秀学生标兵 🪪 11月 王能银获第五届“海聚英才”全球创新创业大赛铜聚奖 🪪 11月 朱一寰获同济大学优秀博士生奖学金 🪪 11月 李勇教授加入APS Open Science期刊Editorial Advisory Board 🔬 11月 周志凌博士获中国香港政府 RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 10月 黄思博博士获聘上海交通大学副教授 🪪 10月 王能银获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 王泉森获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 刘春获硕士生国家奖学金 📝 09月 陈静怡和周志凌博士关于投影非厄米系统中混合简并点的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 09月 李勇教授入选全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力） 📝 08月 王泉森和刘春关于手性保护非对称声信息传输的研究成果发表于自然·通讯 🪪 06月 刘春获法国洛林大学ORION硕士奖学金 📝 06月 葛传昊和王能银关于吸声结构因果律的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 05月 王能银和周志凌/黄思博博士关于超宽频超构吸声体的研究成果发表于国家科学评论 📝 05月 董睿智和朱一寰关于连续谱中拓扑束缚态的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 05月 王能银获同济大学追求卓越学生提名奖 2024年 🔬 12月 李勇教授获批上海市东方英才领军项目 🔬 12月 邵晨博士入选上海市“超级博士后”资助 🪪 12月 王能银入选同济大学第十八届研究生学术先锋 🔬 12月 王泉森获批基金委基础研究专项博士生项目 🪪 11月 王泉森获美国声学学会CIRE学生奖 🔬 11月 邵晨获批中国博士后基金面上项目 🪪 10月 李勇教授获中国国际大学生创新大赛优秀创新创业导师 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛全国金奖 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛上海赛区亚军/金奖 🔬 8月 邵晨博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🔬 8月 宋潮博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🪪 5月 周志凌博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 🪪 3月 周志凌博士论文入选同济大学优秀博士学位论文 2023年 📝 10月 团队关于非局域和非厄米声学超构表面综述文章发表于物理学进展报告 📝 3月 周志凌和贾彬关于手性超构表面的科研成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 3月 王能银和黄思博博士关于超构消声器的科研成果发表于极端制造

pages.title: 📢 Highlights
pages.text: 2026 🪪 In April, Dr. Nengyin Wang was awarded as Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai 🎓 In March, Congratulations to Nengyin Wang on passing his PhD thesis defense 🌍 In March, Associate Professor Mourad Oudich and Dr. Anis Maddi from the University of Lorraine (France) visited the group for academic exchange 📝 In February, Hua Ding and Nengyin Wang published their research on Broadband Acoustic Metamaterial Liners under Grazing Flow in Physical Review Applied 📝 In February, Kaijing Liu and Yihuan Zhu published their research on AI-Driven Acoustic Metamaterials for Pixel-Accurate Sound Insulation Control in Chinese Physics Letters 📝 In January, Yu Xiao’s research on the evolution of scattering singularities in acoustic metasurfaces was published in Science China: Physics, Mechanics & Astronomy 📝 In January, Yujie Cheng and Hua Ding published their research on Broadband Lightweight Metal-Mesh-Integrated Acoustic Metaliner in Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 In January, Professor Yong Li was selected for the 2025 Elsevier “Highly Cited Chinese Researchers” 2025 🪪 In December, Ge Chuanhao’s master’s thesis was selected as Tongji University’s 2025 Excellent Master’s Thesis. 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang was selected for the CAST Young Scientific and Technological Talent Development Program (Doctoral Special Program) 🔬 In December, Yihuan Zhu was selected for the CAST Young Scientific and Technological Talent Development Program (Doctoral Special Program) 🔬 In December, Dr. Ruizhi Dong selected for the Shanghai Post-doctoral Excellence Program 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University Outstanding Student Model award 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Bronze Convergence Award at the 5th “HaiJu YingCai” Global Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition 🪪 In November, Yihuan Zhu received the Tongji University Outstanding Doctoral Student Scholarship 🪪 In November, Professor Yong Li was invited to join the APS Open Science journal’s Editorial Advisory Board 🪪 In November, Huang Sibo was selected as a National High-Level Young Talent Program 🔬 In November, Dr. Zhiling Zhou received the Hong Kong RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 In October, Dr. Sibo Huang appointed as Associate Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University 🪪 In October, Nengyin Wang received the National Doctoral Scholarship 🪪 In October, Quansen Wang received the National Doctoral Scholarship 🪪 In October, Chun Liu received the National Master’s Scholarship 📝 In September, Dr. Jingyi Chen and Dr. Zhiling Zhou published their research on hybrid degeneracy points in projected non-Hermitian systems in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In September, Prof. Yong Li recognized among the World’s Top 2% Scientists (Career Impact) 📝 In August, Quansen Wang and Chun Liu published their work on chirality-protected asymmetric acoustic information transport in Nature Communications 🪪 In June, Chun Liu received the ORION Master’s Scholarship from Université de Lorraine, France 📝 In June, Chuanhao Ge and Nengyin Wang published their research on the causality constraint in acoustic absorbers in Physical Review Letters 📝 In May, Nengyin Wang, Dr. Zhiling Zhou and Dr. Sibo Huang published their study on ultra-broadband metamaterial absorbers in National Science Review 📝 In May, Ruizhi Dong and Yihuan Zhu published their research on topological bound states in the continuum in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In May, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University “Pursuing Excellence” Student Nomination Award 2024 🔬 In December, Prof. Yong Li awarded the Shanghai “Oriental Talent” Leading Program 🔬 In December, Dr. Chen Shao selected for the Shanghai Post-doctoral Excellence Program 🪪 In December, Nengyin Wang recognized as one of the 18th Tongji University Academic Pioneer Graduate Students 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang received the NSFC Basic Research Doctoral Student Project 🪪 In November, Dr. Sibai Huang was selected for a National-Level Young Talent Program 🪪 In November, Quansen Wang received the ASA CIRE Student Award (Acoustical Society of America) 🔬 In November Dr. Chen Shao received the China Postdoctoral Science Foundation Grant 🪪 In October, Prof. Yong Li honored as Outstanding Innovation and Entrepreneurship Mentor at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the National Gold Medal at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the Gold Award / Runner-up Prize (Shanghai Region) at the same competition 🔬 In August, Dr. Chen Shao received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🔬 In August, Dr. Chao Song received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🪪 In May, Dr. Zhiling Zhou awarded the Outstanding Graduate of Shanghai 🪪 In March, Dr. Zhiling Zhou’s dissertation selected as a Tongji University Excellent Doctoral Dissertation 2023 📝 In October, Our review article on nonlocal and non-Hermitian acoustic metasurfaces has been published in Reports on Progress in Physics 📝 In March, Zhiling Zhou and Bin Jia’s research on chiral metasurfaces has been published in Physical Review Letters 📝 In March, Nengyin Wang and Dr. Sibo Huang’s research on metamaterial silencers has been published in International Journal of Extreme Manufacturing
